strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded
Current role includes AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching JD
Strong TDD/craftsmanship background with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is dated (pre-2018)
Limited evidence of cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: Relevant senior full-stack + AI agent experience
Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience

response.justification: Candidate far exceeds the 6+ years requirement with deep full-stack credentials, active AI agent/MCP work that aligns with the role's internal tooling focus, and a strong craftsmanship/testing culture. Primary gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned) and current Kotlin/Java depth, but these are learnable given the demonstrated polyglot history (TS, DLang, Java, C++, Python-adjacent).
